name: peloton-pp-mcp
description: Read-only Peloton workout, class, and structural-provider facts in a private local store.

peloton_oauth_password.title: PELOTON_OAUTH_PASSWORD
peloton_oauth_password.description: Optional. Private bootstrap password supplied by the caller's credential wrapper.

peloton_oauth_username.title: PELOTON_OAUTH_USERNAME
peloton_oauth_username.description: Optional. Private bootstrap username supplied by the caller's credential wrapper.

peloton_user_id.title: PELOTON_USER_ID
peloton_user_id.description: Sets PELOTON_USER_ID for the endpoint template variable {user_id}.
